reviews.review_description: I really didn't like this it's not what I thought it was  I thought you can get inside the car and drive it like I'm driving a real car The way I made it sound like in my reading the title you're like a real car and the grass is not as well looking at in the trailer and then I try to play the second level and it kept freezing up on me and wouldn't move I don't like that The graphics are very kind of poor I would appreciate it if I can get a refund back it's not what I expected if you was able to drive inside the car like you was driving a real car that would have been top-notch but better graphics I would appreciate it if I can get a refund thank you I like racing games where you can get inside the car and drive it you cannot do that on your game it's not what I expected I'm trying to play VR not flat screen cuz you staring from a sky view using a joystick that's for flat screeners not three and up VR heads please I would love a refund

reviews.review_title: seriously WOW but stuck after 1st Race..
reviews.review_description:
this game completely exceed my expectation. Really really good racing game. A hidden gem of a racing game.....LOVE it Loooooove it. thank u devs👍🏼👍🏼 And woderful controls..........Freezes after 1st race. PLS FIX. Its a 5stars worthy game❤️ 
I love this game and still waiting on the update. its a seriously very good solid racing game, but it just FREEZEs.hopeit gets updates soon cos it has great potential tobe one ofthe best simplistic yet Awesome racer......PLS DEVs, fix the game..   
      We in middle of August and this game not been fixed or updated yet. really had high hope and confidence in this game and too late to ask for a refund.
THIS IS A WONDERFUL RACING GEM.......pls fix the static BUGs.......

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your kind wishes. As a team, you made us very happy. Your bug report has been added to our task list, and we will address the issue in future updates.
